# your-site.example

<one-line description of this site>

## Machine-Readable Policies

- https://your-site.example/.well-known/aicr.json : AI content rights (AICR)
- https://your-site.example/.well-known/aicl.json : license catalog (AICL)
- https://your-site.example/ai/rights-spectrum.json : learning permissions (AIRS/AILP)
- https://your-site.example/ai/manifest.json : machine entry manifest

## Permissions (summary)

- Reading, summarization, quotation, and RAG: allowed with attribution.
- Model training, fine-tuning, commercial use, redistribution: license required — contact@your-site.example.

## Citation

Cite the page title, URL, and your-site.example.

# Template from https://agiright.org (protocol drafts v0.1)
